question_detail: Two direct questions: 'كم السعر' (how much?) and 'وريني تفاصيل أكثر' (show me more details). Classic buying-signal pattern — price inquiry then detail request.
active_hours_detail: Both messages sent around 16:19-16:20 (afternoon, عصر). Single session.
dialect_detail: Gulf Arabic. Direct, no filler words. Business-oriented phrasing.
interaction_frequency_detail: Only 2 inbound messages observed. Transitioned state from followup → demo after asking for details.
comprehension_detail: Didn't need identity explanation — jumped straight to 'how much?' and 'show me more'. Already understood what the service is, likely referred by م عبدالمجيد خنكار.
emotional_detail: No emotional language. Purely transactional — price and details. Professional tone.
observed_patterns: Buying signal: price → details = sales funnel progression
No confusion about identity — knows what he's looking at
Connected to م عبدالمجيد خنكار (same company C00010)
